changes_made: Changed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_apiserver_audit_logging_enabled for specificity
review_notes: The functions are applicable to Kubernetes and map well to security monitoring and threat detection capabilities. However, the naming can be improved for specificity and consistency with existing patterns. Specifically, audit logging is an API server feature, so the resource should be 'apiserver'.
naming_improvements: Use 'apiserver' instead of 'audit' for resource name in audit logging functions
title: have been met on the customer’s behalf
step1_reasoning: The control 11.4.4 focuses on ensuring security monitoring and threat detection capabilities are enabled. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to enabling audit logging to monitor API server activities and configuring admission controllers to enforce security policies. These controls help in detecting and responding to security events within a Kubernetes cluster.
